latest_phase: Phase X.2 — Runtime Migration + Assessment Intelligence
latest_event: Open Response Lab activated (20 items, active_private_lab); Phase X.1 assessment intelligence embedded as runtime resource; adaptive session pool expanded to 116 items (approved_private_sba + approved_for_static_demo); Diagnostic SBA stable at 36 items.
current_recommendation: SAT Answer Validator (first Phase X.1 runtime consumer)

maturity_model.interpretation: Engineering maturity estimate, not learner scoring or official assessment.
maturity_model.calculation: Weighted sum of track percentages; weights total 100.

tracks.label: Tutor Core
tracks.evidence: Deterministic Tutor, SAT, misconceptions and snapshots are implemented; regular suite and slow golden are green.
tracks.next_gate: Preserve regression stability while other layers evolve.

tracks.label: Diagnostic SBA Lab
tracks.evidence: 36-item static lab is published; exporter has 36 eligible items and 0 validation errors; deterministic option shuffle is active.
tracks.next_gate: Keep the stable public payload unchanged while private practice expands.

tracks.label: Master Bank Foundation
tracks.evidence: 616 records consolidated; importer canonical (public_lab: 36); adaptive session pool expanded to 116 items (approved_for_static_demo + approved_private_sba); grounding remediations (V4.2) applied; V4.3 readiness audit complete.
tracks.next_gate: Wire full 116-item pool into deployed adaptive session frontend.

tracks.label: Open Response Lab
tracks.evidence: 20 items active; all approved review records activated; assessment intelligence (Phase X.1) embedded as runtime resource: 6 command verbs, 6 SAT quality levels, 7 CRF patterns, 6 improvement patterns, mentor hints by topic.
tracks.next_gate: Frontend consumer reads assessment_intelligence for adaptive feedback display.

tracks.label: Adaptive Engine
tracks.evidence: Pedagogical rules and a base SBA composer exist; no adaptive 50-question runtime is implemented.
tracks.next_gate: Implement deterministic block-by-block adaptation against learner-state evidence.

tracks.label: Governed Generation
tracks.evidence: Governance and lifecycle contracts exist; no governed question-generation runtime is active.
tracks.next_gate: Complete evidence-backed readiness and approval contracts before implementation.

tracks.label: Knowledge Utilization Mapping
tracks.evidence: Phase X.1 complete: 25 JSON files ingested from official WSET spec, SAT framework, marking keys, model answers, command verbs, and mentor framework. Phase X.2: assessment intelligence activated as runtime resources in open response lab.
tracks.next_gate: Wire retrieval and Tutor layers to consume Phase X.1 assets (SAT Answer Validator → next).

tracks.label: Project State Engine
tracks.evidence: Repository reconciliation and dashboard updater exist, but state derivation remains partly manual and stale-state prone.
tracks.next_gate: Automate evidence collection and freshness validation without reading private learner artifacts.
